reason_for_decision: The revised article now explains layered radar as a timing and workflow architecture rather than a generic multi-range slogan, which pushes it above the pass threshold.
strengths: The outer-, middle-, and inner-layer framing is now operationally specific and easy to apply.
The article connects sensing layers to response timing, ambiguity reduction, and workflow ownership.
Scenario mapping for airports, ports, and industrial sites adds practical planning value.
summary_assessment: This version is now a strong knowledge-base article. It is more structured, more technical, and substantially more useful for civil-security planning.
